wikipedia.title: Laurel County, Kentucky
wikipedia.summary: Laurel County is a county located in the southeastern portion of the U.S. state of Kentucky. As of the 2020 census, the population was 62,613. Its county seat is London. wikipedia.title: Peoria, Illinois
wikipedia.summary: Peoria is a city in Peoria County, Illinois, United States, and its county seat. Located on the Illinois River, the city had a population of 113,150 as of the 2020 census, making it the eighth-most populous city in Illinois. wikipedia.title: Kentucky
wikipedia.summary: Kentucky, officially the Commonwealth of Kentucky, is a landlocked state in the Southeastern region of the United States. wikipedia.title: Decatur, Illinois
wikipedia.summary: Decatur is the largest city in Macon County, Illinois, United States, and its county seat. The city was founded in 1829 and is situated along the Sangamon River and Lake Decatur in Central Illinois. As of the 2020 census, it had a population of 70,522.
